summary: HandyHub P1 Features Testing - Service Zones, Provider Invoices, Multi-Step Booking Form. All 18 backend API tests passed, all 47 frontend tests passed. Ukrainian UI text verified for service zones (Зони обслуговування), invoices (Мої інвойси), and booking form (Нове замовлення, Опишіть завдання).
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features tested successfully. ServiceZonesPanel (admin), ProviderInvoiceList/InvoiceCreateModal (provider), MultiStepBookingModal (client) all functioning correctly. Provider dashboard nav changed from 'performance' to 'invoices' tab - updated all spec files to reflect this.

admin_service_zones.description: Service Zones Panel for geofencing management in admin dashboard
tests: Admin can navigate to Zones tab
Service Zones panel displays correctly (Ukrainian)
Create Zone modal opens with correct fields
Quick city selection populates form correctly
Create Zone modal can be cancelled
Service Zones displays zones or empty state
Zone cards show correct information

provider_invoices.description: Provider Invoice List and Create Modal
tests: Provider can navigate to Invoices tab
Invoices tab displays invoice list header
Invoices tab shows empty state when no invoices
Create Invoice button opens modal
Invoice Create modal can be cancelled
Invoice Create modal shows no bookings message
Invoice Create modal has additional charges input
Invoice Create modal has notes textarea
Client home shows services and booking option
Clicking service opens Multi-Step Booking Modal
Multi-Step Form Step 1 - Task Details
Multi-Step Form navigation - Next button advances step
Multi-Step Form Step 2 - Address fields
Multi-Step Form Back button returns to previous step
Multi-Step Form progress bar shows 5 steps
Multi-Step Form modal can be closed
